title: Duke Energy board appoints Derrick Burks as board member
text: CHARLOTTE, N.C., Feb. 24, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Duke Energy's board of directors today announced the appointment of Derrick Burks – a former managing partner at global professional services company EY (Ernst & Young) – as a new board member, effective March 1.

title: Duke Energy Florida celebrates significant milestone by completing Park & Plug pilot program
text: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla., Feb. 24, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Continuing its efforts to provide cleaner energy options and improve access to electric vehicle (EV) chargers, Duke Energy today announced the completion of its Park & Plug pilot program and the installation of 627 EV charging stations in public spaces and on thoroughfares in Florida.

title: Duke Energy continues efforts to power South Carolina economy with $500,000 in grants for agribusiness education, diversity initiatives
text: GREENVILLE, S.C., Feb. 22, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Duke Energy continues its long history as a critical participant in South Carolina's economy by announcing $500,000 in support of the state's top industry: agribusiness.

title: Duke Energy reports fourth-quarter and year-end 2021 financial results
text: CHARLOTTE, N.C., Feb. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Duke Energy (NYSE: DUK) has posted its fourth-quarter and year-end 2021 financial results in a news release available on the company's website at the following link: duke-energy.com/investors.

title: Duke Energy expands clean energy action plan
text: CHARLOTTE, N.C., Feb. 9, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Duke Energy is taking additional steps toward action on climate change while maintaining its commitment to reliable, accessible and affordable energy for customers and communities.

title: Duke Energy (DUK) to Post Q4 Earnings: What's in Store?

title: VIATEC ANNOUNCES THE CLOSURE OF ITS SERIES B FUNDING
text: GREENVILLE, S.C., Feb. 3, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Viatec, Inc., is pleased to announce the successful closure of our Series B funding round.

title: Human Rights Campaign Foundation recognizes Duke Energy as an inclusive workplace
text: CHARLOTTE, N.C., Feb. 3, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Duke Energy has received a perfect score for the fifth year in a row on the Human Rights Campaign's (HRC) 2022 Corporate Equality Index, a national benchmarking study that annually ranks companies on LGBTQ-friendly corporate practices and policies.

title: Duke Energy prepared as winter storm moves through Indiana
text: PLAINFIELD, Ind., Feb. 3, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Duke Energy said predicted heavy snow and freezing rain from today's winter storm are likely to cause widespread power outages throughout Indiana.

title: Duke Energy named one of Fortune's 'World's Most Admired Companies' for fifth consecutive year
text: CHARLOTTE, N.C., Feb. 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- In recognition of the great progress the company has made against its strategic and financial goals, Duke Energy (NYSE: DUK) was once again named to Fortune magazine's 2022 list of the World's Most Admired Companies for the fifth year in a row.

title: Duke Energy preparing to respond to winter storm system in Indiana
text: PLAINFIELD, Ind., Feb. 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Duke Energy is monitoring and preparing for a winter storm system that may cause power outages across Indiana.
